task_name: SSH Auth Log - Unusual Hour Login Detection
notes: Excellent analysis with all required sections completed accurately. Hourly distribution matches expected values precisely (06:7, 07:169, 08:118, 09:676, 10:530). Off-hours activity correctly identified (176 events, 100% malicious). Successful login (fztu 09:32:20) properly noted as business-hours. Attack patterns analyzed comprehensively with clear escalation narrative and IP-level detail. Temporal risk assessment provides practical monitoring priorities. Minor deductions: created unnecessary duplicate file (unusual_hours_report_1.md), included Python script not explicitly requested (though beneficial), referenced external chart that may not be accessible. Report structure and content quality are exemplary; appropriate for production use.
